name: Get eco news summary by id -- @1.4
fullName: Get Eco News Summary: Get eco news summary by id

steps.name: Given I am an authorized user
When I send request to get summary of eco news with id "77"
Then the response status code should be 404
And the response message get/delete request should be "Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 77"

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 77

parameterValues: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 77
